{{Infobox character
| name = Feiora Torannus (The Traveler's Gate Trilogy)
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|open a Gate, summon a spear}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Overlord}}
| appears_in = Traveler's Gate
| introduced = [[City of Light (novel)|City of Light]]
}}

== City of Light ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">8</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Overlord Feiora wears a dark leather breastplate and hardened leather on her shins and forearms.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c9">''City of Light'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Feiora is an Overlord who has a raven.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Feiora has a [[Territory]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c10">''City of Light'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Feiora finished a discussion with [[Indirial]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Feiora can open a Gate.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c12">''City of Light'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Feiora can summon a spear.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Feiora has a raven named [[Eugan]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c14">''City of Light'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Feiora is someone [[Lycus]] wants to get back to and help.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c14" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
